title: No Cave Sounds
description: Removes cave sounds from the game without needing to turn off ambient sounds.
body:
Everyone has jumped at the sudden cave sound while digging deep for diamonds, whether it's your first time or 65129th time going underground. There's a solution of disabling ambient sounds, but then other sounds won't be audible.

This incredibly light-weight pack removes all cave sounds from the game without the need to turn off all ambience or using silent sound files. It simply tells the game that the cave sound event has no sounds. In fact, the largest thing in this pack is the icon.
